metadata.title:
REGULAR n. P.


BOUT TONIGHT

COUNCllMEN UPON WHOM


FATE OR ORDINANCE RESTS
MAY GET CHANCE TO Elk.
PRESS THEIR OPINIONS NOW

pages.raw_text:
The first real efforts towards get
ting the proposed ordinance to ele-
vate the Northern Pacific tracks in
some sort of shane in which its pas
sage may be possible will be at
tempted tonight by the council in
committee of the whole. 1t is pro
posed to take up the ordinance Sec
ton by section and, guided by the
city legal adviser, l.. r. Hamblen,
evolve an ordinance in which the
city shall be properly safeguarded


The last two sessions of the
council developed into personalities
between those opposed to and
those in favor of the N. P. plans.
The councilmen took no part,
merely sitting as interested lis,
teners. Whether the hot discus.
siens will enter at all into the coun-
ellis actions tonight is question
Councilmen say they will be peace
able. but that as individuals they
hold their own opinions and these
have not been in any wise changed
by either the opposition or the
others.
